texto.html: Trade the international market with up to 70%OFF

hero.descricao: A proprietary trading firm to grow your career as a trader from anywhere in the world, operating at high volume and profiting in one of the most rewarding professions out there.

topicos.card_desafio: The stage where you apply your trading technique and reach the profit target set by your chosen plan. Every plan includes specific risk management rules, and traders who hit the target while respecting our RM framework reach high levels in the trading world, since the framework was designed to take traders further. Every plan gives you 60 calendar days to reach the target. After completing this stage, traders move on to the incubator phase.
topicos.card_incubadora: Just being at this stage shows real talent. And this is the ideal environment to prove your consistency. The trading environment is still simulated, but traders receive a reward of up to 90% in cash for their performance every 30-day cycle. Accounts are monitored, and at the end of two cycles, after hitting the plan's target again, traders are evaluated by our risk team — the best ones can then be selected for our live account.
topicos.card_trader: An environment for the real traders who proved their skills are worth serious money. This is a sub-account funded by Zero7, with leverage up to 20x greater than your personal account. Performance payouts happen at the end of every 30-day cycle. Traders are free to manage their operations however they prefer — by technique, by number of trading days, or by financial target. And as you advance in our career plan, traders no longer need to invest a single dollar to trade unlimited contracts inside Zero7.

ba.hero_titulo: The most innovative trading platform on the global market
ba.label_descricao: Discover thousands of opportunities in the global market, whatever your trader profile.

descricao.html: Zero7 has developed a completely unique trading model. Here, traders can access large accounts, with many lots, paying up to 20 times less than the amount they would need to put up in their personal accounts. After passing the evaluation — with 60 days to complete — traders start their journey on the desk through the Incubator, where they can trade in a simulated environment while being rewarded with up to 90% of the profits they make, with zero risk to their own capital. Then, they can progress to the live account and grow through a career plan designed to deliver increasing payouts over time. Zero7 also offers countless benefits, such as Permanent Approval, training, and complete courses available in the Trader Area.

plan.tooltip_com: After reaching the target, you pay an activation fee and move on to the incubator.
plan.tooltip_sem: Reach the target and move straight to the incubator, with no additional fees.
